attacking_style: Specializes in early breakaway moves, showing strong ability to dominate in the front group from the opening kilometers rather than late-race attacks.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish clear team support patterns; appears to operate independently in breakaway scenarios.
terrain_preference: Demonstrates strength in breakaway situations across varied terrain, but struggles with technical descents and bunch positioning that lead to crashes.
vulnerability: Significant crash tendency in peloton positioning and technical sections; both observed races ended with crashes despite earlier strength in breakaways.
key_patterns: Consistently dominates early breakaway groups before crashing later in stages (2 observations).
Poor bunch positioning skills lead to crashes under race pressure (2 observations).
Shows physical strength in breakaways but lacks tactical safety awareness (2 observations).
form_trajectory: negative: demonstrated physical strength in breakaways but repeated crashes in 2017 indicate serious positioning and bike-handling issues that undermine race performance
